gaps.description: runtime/sense.js missing — agentic-sense MediaPipe perception module not implemented
runtime/memory.js missing — agentic-store memory module not implemented
install/ directory missing — no setup.sh, Dockerfile, or docker-compose.yml for one-click deployment
Cloud fallback in LLM runtime not implemented — vision requires auto-fallback to cloud when local hardware insufficient
Multi-device coordination via hub.js is skeleton only — no WebSocket messaging or message routing between devices
STT/TTS have no hardware-adaptive provider selection — always delegates to agentic-voice without profile-based config
Admin UI (src/ui/admin) exists but lacks device management, log viewer, and hardware info panels
npx agentic-service one-click install flow not wired — bin/ entry exists but full setup sequence (Ollama check, model pull, browser open) incomplete
Hardware detector and optimizer implemented — GPU/memory/arch detection and profile matching present
LLM runtime implemented — local Ollama chat with streaming via agentic-core
STT and TTS runtime wrappers implemented — transcribe and synthesize via agentic-voice
REST API server implemented — /api/chat, /api/transcribe, /api/synthesize, /api/status, /api/config endpoints present
Vector embedding runtime (embed.js) implemented — agentic-embed integration present
Client UI implemented — Vue 3 chat interface with ChatBox, MessageList, InputBox components
